subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! Bear thou witness to My love for thee, whereunto all things bear witness, and beyond them My glorious Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا ان اشهد حبی ایاک و یشهد بذلک کل الاشیا و عن ورائها نفسی العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
